3035100.name: You Must Retry
3035100.description:
You Must Retry is a fast-paced roguelike adventure in a randomly generated world. Fight, explore, improve, every attempt is not in vain.

  • World. A huge randomly generated world divided into regions.

  • Enemies. Fight a variety of enemies, from harmless maggots to deadly bosses.

  • Difficulty. Gradually increasing difficulty. With each new region, the enemies are more numerous and stronger.

  • Items. Fifty unique items that change the style of play, as well as randomly generated items to complete the perfect build.

  • Abilities. Upgrade basic abilities as you progress, making them more deadly. Gain new unique abilities through items.

  • Death. One way or another it will overtake you. Each new attempt will bring you closer to your goal. Extensive meta progression options make every loss not in vain.
3035100.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
